_source: The Well, arXiv:2412.00568v2, Table 3 (time-averaged rollout VRMSE); yes = any baseline >10 in any rollout window (6:12 or 13:30)

_variant_provenance.euler_multi_quadrants_periodicBC: Table 3's row is labeled 'euler_multi_quadrants'; the benchmark's baselines are the periodic-boundary variant per the paper's own row labels elsewhere: Table 2 and the appendix validation/hyperparameter tables all read 'euler_multi_quadrants (periodic b.c.)' (arXiv:2412.00568v2).
_variant_provenance.MHD_64: Table 3's row is labeled 'MHD_64' verbatim (the 256 variant has no published row).
_variant_provenance.supernova_explosion_64: Table 3's row is labeled 'supernova_explosion_64' verbatim (the 128 variant has no published row).
